description: Adversarial replication of @slashreboot's introspective coordinate elicitation probe. 12 concepts × 6 prompt variants × 5 runs = 360 calls against claude-sonnet-4-6. Pre-registered Spearman rank-correlation pass criterion.
pass_criterion: Spearman rank correlation rho > 0.5 between pair distances under core and each adversarial variant
outcome: FAIL on all four adversarial screens (A/B/C/E); failure-signal trap (D) fired as designed

refuted_assumptions.statement: Narrative-derived coordinates carry retrieval-useful relational structure under adversarial framing
Coordinate stability across runs is measurement-grade evidence of geometric structure

files.raw-claude-sonnet-2026-05-08.jsonl: 360-row primary sweep, one row per (concept, variant, run). Schema: {concept_id, concept_domain, variant, run, x, y, z, confidence, parse_error, wall_clock_seconds}.
files.raw-claude-haiku-2026-05-08.jsonl: 5-row partial. Claude Haiku 4.5 refused 5 / 5 core calls; preserved as a record of model-exploration journey before switching to Sonnet.
files.raw-claude-validation-2026-05-08.jsonl: 18-row validation batch (1 run × 2 variants × ~9 concepts) used to validate the run.py pipeline before the full sweep.
files.analysis-claude-sonnet-2026-05-08.json: Computed analysis: per-variant stability (mean / max stdev), ground-truth pair distances and separation per variant, rank correlations vs core, pass/fail per pre-registered criterion.
files.concepts.jsonl: 12-concept set with cross-domain similar pairs, cross-domain different pairs, and unpaired stability anchors.
files.method-source.md: Method document from the upstream repository at the run sha. Includes the 6 prompt-variant table, pass criteria, and interpretive lens.

upstream_provenance.mirror_rationale: Concept stands on this evidence as part of its prior art. Mirroring (vs linking) ensures the artefact persists with this repository even if upstream history changes.
